summary: PTR build #16 (07-21): class tuning + Venomous Abyss set changes. Tiers refreshed (WoWMeta 24 M+ reclustering). WCL rdps-broken: 5 unreach/3 raw. +17 izen metaNotes, queue 2->8.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) re-fetched live via curl; parsed with a linear tier-cell→spec-icon scan (tooltip tables were truncating a naive <tr> parse), incl the A+ M+ tier. Era-verified Midnight 12.0.7. 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs committed. Snapshots 07-22.

Both pages re-fetched live; parsed tier__tier X-tier blocks (tier__title letter + data-original-title entries). Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream = absence, not error), M+ 40 (the second S/A/B/C dungeon block correctly rejected via roster match) = 79 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs committed. Snapshots 07-22.

All 6 pages via r.jina.ai; parsed the numbered ranking list 'N. Spec Class (X Tier)' with a regex made tolerant of '(S-Tier)'/'(S Tier)'/no-space-before-paren and the '16. Subtlety Rogue B Tier)' missing-open-paren typo. Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7. 80 rows (40+40), 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs committed. Snapshots 07-22.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages re-parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection (name field space-stripped to match roster); 80 rows, 0 unmatched, 3 M+ tier moves vs committed (Holy Pal C->B, Disc Priest B->A, Resto Shaman A->S = normal Archon daily churn). Archon upstream lastUpdated 2026-07-21T12:00Z. Snapshots 07-22.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched. encounter-tiers.json asOf 07-22.
Survivability tierList re-parsed from all 3 raid pages: 27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank = 40 rows, 4 tier moves vs committed. Merged via apply-metrics survivability key. asOf 07-22.

3 M+ pages re-fetched via r.jina.ai; parsed the tier-list table ('X tier' row markers + 'Spec Class Meta Build' link titles). Era-verified 'MN 12.0.7 / Mythic+ Season 1' - NO season flip. 40/40 specs (S/A/B/C/D), 0 unmatched. 24 M+ tier moves vs committed - WoWMeta Ckmeans reclustering (its tier column tracks representation n, which swings during the reset week); verified against the page, NOT a Blizzard retune (consensus movement is 0 - averaged out across the 5 sources). Raid pages still unranked upstream (null). Snapshots 07-22.

Per wcl-fetch/evidence.json (verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-22T12:14Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 - the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL creds and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:178 3T:126 5T:1877). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-22.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar & Ula'tek 0 = untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-22.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 934-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-22.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) re-fetched live via plain GET; parsed the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling per spec card (display name -> first 4-digit rating; two specs with an extra media-background promo card handled by matching on the ranked card's display name), range 3738-4288. Era-verified Midnight Season 1. asOf 07-22.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles re-fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 confirmed on every chart; targets 1/2/3/5/8/15 taken from the single MID1 build. Augmentation absent by design. asOf 07-22.

Nightly MID1_Raid report (.txt, 1.5MB) re-fetched; DPS Ranking block parsed (progress-bar noise filtered), best hero-variant per DPS spec = 26/26. Build MID1 (12.0.7), no season flip. Tanks/healers/Augmentation excluded by design. asOf 07-22.

Period 1072 (1073 not yet built - 404) re-fetched live via r.jina.ai (SvelteKit; raw HTML is a JS shell). Era 'Period 1072 MID1', no season flip. 35 specs parsed from the representation list; 5 absent at ~0 keys (Blood DK, Resto Druid, Devastation Evoker, Holy Pal, Holy Priest) keep stored values via upsert. asOf 07-22.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. NEW build logged: Linxy post #16 (2026-07-21, 'Week of July 21st') - a large class-tuning build across ~24 specs plus Venomous Abyss (S2) tier-set changes. Added ptr-builds.json entry (32 highlights); updated tierSet set2/set4+asOf+source for Havoc DH (4pc 35%), Assassination Rogue (4pc 3%/stack), Restoration Shaman (2pc 8s + 4pc absorb -30%), Arms Warrior (2pc bug-fix re-verify), Augmentation Evoker (S1-2pc note, S2 re-verified unchanged); appended 07-21 build lines to 4 writeups' changes[]. RSS also datamine-recapped the same build (382229/382230); no season flip.

All 25 unique creator RSS feeds polled live (25/25 OK). Deterministic transcript step fetched both queued videos (summary.json verdict ok). Distilled izen m5lEbh4lrHA 'Best DPS Specs After Tuning' (07-20 Mythic raid-testing recap) -> 17 new metaNotes (lens 'raid testing outlook'), superseding 12 older izen raid-lens notes. Supatease BvJ3o0_Tt3Q '12.1 Most Nerfed Class' transcript-verified-skipped (PvP Frost-Mage snare snippet, out of scope). Queued 8 new in-scope build-#16 reaction videos (Kalamazi, Whispyr, Baze, Obli, Shadarek, VooDooSaurus, Dratnos, Supatease); izen latest refreshed to g0NmG9sVQ-Q. Pending queue 2->8.
